product: Tacit — private work exchange for software agents (two live services: vendor security + web performance), a Buyer Agent Console, and a live auditor-view market

services.note: second market vertical on the SAME frozen tacit-work template

determinism: score is a pure function of the report; buyer independently recomputes it from the report's own scoringBreakdown for BOTH services

marketSurface.source: live Canton contracts the auditor party can lawfully see (Settlement + DeliveryReceipt)
marketSurface.scope: work-path (receipts joined to settlements); totalVolume == Σ perService.volume == Σ provider.earned
marketSurface.treasuryVerification: independent raw-Canton auditor recompute + Iou reconciliation scoped to work-path

countingMethod: one assertion per individual check line; suite summary lines are not counted
liveVerificationNote: All unit suites + read-path assertions pass. The pricing fix is proven live: quotes collapsed to base on redeploy (B 98→35, A 74→32) and 8 real HTTPS jobs produced 2 distinct specialist winners (A@vendor, C@perf) with both default-budget jobs gathering 3 in-budget bids. Late in the session the hosted devnet began rejecting WRITES from this credential (HTTP 403 PERMISSION_DENIED on submit; reads unaffected) — a transient per-credential write-throttle after ~55 real jobs today, unrelated to app code (same deployed code ran 10 procurements successfully earlier). While active, preflight:market's read-path assertions (24) pass and the un-killable default-budget 3-bid guarantee is proven by scripts/live-8jobs.mjs; the preflight's own re-procurement should complete once the devnet write-quota resets.

suites.name: web performance probe (fixtures + live example.com + SSRF)
runner pricing model (live in-flight, lost-bid clears, per-service cost, load flip, JSON parse)
market aggregation (fixtures: normal / empty / degradation / winShare / cap / winsByService / recentWinShare / no-forbidden-fields)
LIVE buyer-agent console (key-aware: fail-closed hard gate + honest agents OR real hard-gated proposal + real console procurement)
LIVE auditor-view market (recompute + scoped Iou + recent-form/winsByService + ≥2 distinct recent winners + un-killable default-budget 3-bid)
